First, you should consult with an attorney to determine if there are any defenses to your DUI charge. The most common defenses to a DUI charge are:

* Lack of probable cause
* Lack of competency
* Intoxication was not to the extent of impairment
* Illegal stop
* Illegal search and seizure
* Improper field sobriety test

If you are able to demonstrate any of these defenses, you may be able to get your charges reduced or dismissed.
